fields.name: Napoleon Cake
fields.description: A classic layered pastry dessert with custard cream.
fields.instructions: 1. Prepare the dough. 2. Bake the layers. 3. Spread custard cream between layers. 4. Chill before serving.

fields.name: Greek Salad
fields.description: A refreshing salad with feta cheese, olives, and vegetables.
fields.ingredients: Cucumbers, tomatoes, feta cheese, olives, olive oil
fields.instructions: 1. Chop vegetables. 2. Add feta and olives. 3. Drizzle with olive oil.

fields.name: BBQ Chicken Wings
fields.description: Spicy baked chicken wings with BBQ sauce.
fields.instructions: 1. Marinate the wings. 2. Bake in the oven. 3. Serve hot.

fields.name: Oatmeal with Fruits
fields.description: A healthy breakfast with berries and honey.
fields.instructions: 1. Cook the oatmeal. 2. Add berries and honey on top.

fields.name: Tomato Bruschetta
fields.description: Crispy toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes and basil.
fields.ingredients: Baguette, tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil
fields.instructions: 1. Toast the baguette slices. 2. Add tomato mixture. 3. Serve immediately.
